channel.title: Amiga on jamesm.blog
channel.description: Recent content in Amiga on jamesm.blog

item.title: Trainer Menus & Scrolltexts: The Unique Aesthetics of the Cracking Scene
item.description: How cracking groups transformed pirated games with menus, cheat systems, and animated scrolltext screens - creating a visual language that defined 1980s underground computing culture.

item.title: What the Amiga Got Right (That We're Still Copying)
item.description: Why the Amiga was 20 years ahead of its time, and why modern operating systems are still trying to copy its best ideas.
